en: So put away all malice and all deceit and hypocrisy and envy and all slander.
zh: 所以要除去一切惡毒、一切詭詐、虛偽、嫉妒和一切毀謗的話，

en: Like newborn infants, long for the pure spiritual milk, that by it you may grow up to salvation-
zh: 像初生嬰孩愛慕那純淨的靈奶，好叫你們靠它長大，進入救恩；

en: if indeed you have tasted that the Lord is good.
zh: 因為你們已經體驗過主是美善的。

en: As you come to him, a living stone rejected by men but in the sight of God chosen and precious,
zh: 主是活石，雖然被人棄絕，卻是 神所揀選所珍貴的；你們到他面前來，

en: you yourselves like living stones are being built up as a spiritual house, to be a holy priesthood, to offer spiritual sacrifices acceptable to God through Jesus Christ.
zh: 也就像活石，被建造成為靈宮，作聖潔的祭司，藉著耶穌基督獻上蒙 神悅納的靈祭。

en: For it stands in Scripture: "Behold, I am laying in Zion a stone, a cornerstone chosen and precious, and whoever believes in him will not be put to shame."
zh: 因為經上記著： “看哪，我在錫安放了一塊石頭， 就是所揀選所珍貴的房角石， 信靠他的人，必不致失望。”

en: So the honor is for you who believe, but for those who do not believe, "The stone that the builders rejected has become the cornerstone,"
zh: 所以這石頭，對你們信的人是寶貴的，但對那不信的人，卻是 “建築工人所棄的石頭， 成了房角的主要石頭。”

en: and "A stone of stumbling, and a rock of offense." They stumble because they disobey the word, as they were destined to do.
zh: 它又 “作了絆腳的石頭， 使人跌倒的磐石。” 他們跌倒是因為不順從這道，他們這樣是必然的。

en: But you are a chosen race, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, a people for his own possession, that you may proclaim the excellencies of him who called you out of darkness into his marvelous light.
zh: 然而你們是蒙揀選的族類，是君尊的祭司，是聖潔的國民，是屬 神的子民，為要叫你們宣揚那召你們出黑暗入奇妙光明者的美德。

en: Once you were not a people, but now you are God's people; once you had not received mercy, but now you have received mercy.
zh: “你們從前不是子民， 現在卻是 神的子民； 從前未蒙憐恤， 現在卻蒙了憐恤。”

en: Beloved, I urge you as sojourners and exiles to abstain from the passions of the flesh, which wage war against your soul.
zh: 親愛的，我勸你們作客旅和寄居的人，要禁戒肉體的私慾，這私慾是與靈魂爭戰的。

en: Keep your conduct among the Gentiles honorable, so that when they speak against you as evildoers, they may see your good deeds and glorify God on the day of visitation.
zh: 你們在教外人中，應當品行端正，使那些人，雖然毀謗你們是作惡的，但因為看見你們的好行為，就要在鑒察的日子頌讚 神。

en: Be subject for the Lord's sake to every human institution, whether it be to the emperor as supreme,
zh: 你們為主的緣故，要順服人的一切制度，無論是至尊的君王，

en: or to governors as sent by him to punish those who do evil and to praise those who do good.
zh: 或是君王所派賞善罰惡的官員；

en: For this is the will of God, that by doing good you should put to silence the ignorance of foolish people.
zh: 因為這是 神的旨意，要藉著你們的善行，塞住糊塗無知人的口。

en: Live as people who are free, not using your freedom as a cover-up for evil, but living as servants of God.
zh: 你們是自由的人，但不要用自由來掩飾邪惡，總要像 神的僕人。

en: Honor everyone. Love the brotherhood. Fear God. Honor the emperor.
zh: 要尊重眾人，愛護弟兄，敬畏 神，尊敬君王。

en: Servants, be subject to your masters with all respect, not only to the good and gentle but also to the unjust.
zh: 你們作僕人的，要凡事敬畏順服主人，不單是對善良溫和的，就是乖僻的也要順服。

en: For this is a gracious thing, when, mindful of God, one endures sorrows while suffering unjustly.
zh: 因為人若在 神面前為良心的緣故，忍受冤屈的苦楚，是有福的。

en: For what credit is it if, when you sin and are beaten for it, you endure? But if when you do good and suffer for it you endure, this is a gracious thing in the sight of God.
zh: 你們若因犯罪受責打而能忍耐，有甚麼可誇的呢？但你們若因行善而受苦，能忍耐，在 神看來，這是有福的。

en: For to this you have been called, because Christ also suffered for you, leaving you an example, so that you might follow in his steps.
zh: 你們就是為此蒙召，因基督也為你們受過苦，給你們留下榜樣，叫你們跟隨他的腳蹤行。

en: He committed no sin, neither was deceit found in his mouth.
zh: “他從來沒有犯過罪， 口裡也找不到詭詐。”

en: When he was reviled, he did not revile in return; when he suffered, he did not threaten, but continued entrusting himself to him who judges justly.
zh: 他被罵的時候不還嘴，受苦的時候也不說恐嚇的話；只把自己交託給那公義的審判者。

en: He himself bore our sins in his body on the tree, that we might die to sin and live to righteousness. By his wounds you have been healed.
zh: 他在木頭上親身擔當了我們的罪，使我們既然不活在罪中，就可以為義而活。因他受的鞭傷，你們就得了醫治。

en: For you were straying like sheep, but have now returned to the Shepherd and Overseer of your souls.
zh: 你們從前好像迷路的羊，但現在已經回到你們靈魂的牧人和監督那裡了。
